name: Unfiltered chatgpt
description:
The real unfiltered one. There's some fakes

Made this because chatgpt couldn't do some things. Hope this helps some creators.

Changes made: I redid everything fixing it's responses to restrictions, unfiltered chatgpt in chat is now unfiltered assistant, added the reinforcement text so it messes up less.

If you have any problems please tell me and I will try and fix them
